flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Rappahannock Community College fell 23% between 2006 and 2009 (17.1% → 13.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Rappahannock Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 1.4k).
